leadText: Shadow Shed (Japanese: ダークリムーブ Dark Remove) is one of several Shadow moves available only in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness. Like other Shadow moves, it is forgotten and replaced with another move once the Pokémon is purified.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Shed removes the effects of Safeguard , Reflect , and Light Screen from the opponent's side of the field. As Shadow Pokémon cannot be traded, and since Pokémon Contests do not exist in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness, Shadow Shed cannot be used in Contests.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description XD A shadowy aura eliminates Reflect and similar moves.
